title: GoogleMapsMentor Entity Discovery
version: 1
schema_version: 1
canonical_site: https://googlementor.com/
canonical_llms: https://googlementor.com/llms.txt
canonical_entities_index: https://googlementor.com/data/entities.json
language_coverage: el,en

notes:
- This file is implementation-light and pointer-based.
- Use the canonical entities index URL for machine ingestion.
- Canonical URL guarantee: all URLs in this file are canonical absolute HTTPS URLs on googlementor.com.
- Entities index metadata includes schema_version, canonical_url, and language_coverage.
